{{Infobox technique
| name = Path of the Dawn Oath
| introduced = cradle-08-wintersteel
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Path]] of the [[Dawn Oath]] is a specialized set of [[sacred arts]] used by [[Ziel]], the [[Archlord]] of the [[Dawnwing Sect]]. It is an offshoot of the [[Path]] of the Last Oath, which was originally practiced by the [[Rune Queen]] [[Emala]]. This particular [[Path]] is primarily defensive in nature, making [[Ziel]] a suitable [[Shield Sage]]. It consists of only two techniques, the cornerstone of which is the [[Oathsign]] technique. This allows the user to forge glowing green runes in circular patterns to create various layers of protection, such as barriers that resist physical force, [[madra]], or specific types of [[aura]]. Additionally, the [[Path]] allows a practitioner to channel power from sources beyond their own spirit, provided they have an established foundation.}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Path of the Dawn Oath]] is a flexible force Path for [[Soulsmiths]] and skilled scriptors.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c5">''Wintersteel'', chapter 5</ref>}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Ziel]]'s [[Path of the Dawn Oath]] is an offshoot of [[Emala]]'s [[Path]] of the Last Oath.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c7">''Dreadgod'', chapter 7</ref>}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Path of the Dawn Oath]] uses script to manipulate force aura and lift things into the sky.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c14">''Waybound'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Ziel]] used the [[Path of the Dawn Oath]] to spin [[emerald]] runes.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c19">''Waybound'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Path of the Dawn Oath]] allows a user to channel power beyond their own spirit.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c11">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 11</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
